disabled_regimes: Low basis volatility: z-score undefined

BASIS_FUNDING_DISLOCATION.notes: Cross-venue basis persistence folded into basis/funding dislocation.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize information ratio of mean-reversion return within window_end bars. Require at least 40 events per asset over calibration window.

failure_modes.Stale perp data feed: basis appears large but is a data artifact

failure_modes.Funding payment bar: basis jumps mechanically at funding timestamps

calibration.stability_requirement: anchor_quantile consistent across BTC/ETH spot-perp pairs within 0.01. Hit rate of reversion within window_end > 55% on both halves.

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price action confirms signal validity

detector.formula:
basis[i]       = perp_close[i] - spot_close[i]
basis_z[i]     = (basis[i] - mean(basis, basis_lookback)) / std(basis, basis_lookback)
shock_th       = quantile(abs(basis_z), anchor_quantile) over basis_lookback
shock_flag[i]  = abs(basis_z[i]) >= shock_th
revert_flag[i] = abs(basis_z[i]) <= revert_z
event onset    = shock_flag transitions False to True
event exit     = first subsequent bar where revert_flag = True (capped at window_end)
detector.signal_definition: Detects cross-venue price desynchronization: spot-perp basis (or inter-exchange basis) exceeds its extreme quantile, indicating one venue is lagging price discovery. Event exits when basis z-score reverts.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected at bar close of onset bar. window_end caps maximum event duration in bars.

disabled_regimes.SPREAD_BLOWOUT active: execution cost exceeds basis reversion profit

expected_overlap.LIQUIDATION_CASCADE: moderate; cascade can create cross-venue desync

false_positive_scenarios.Funding payment timestamps: instantaneous basis jump with no trading edge

false_positive_scenarios.Market open: basis may be mechanically elevated at session start

invalidation_conditions: Basis continues expanding beyond 2x onset z-score (no reversion setup)
New shock within window_end bars of prior event

parameters.trigger: Detector triggers on cross venue desync pattern

BASIS_FUNDING_DISLOCATION.notes: Funding dislocation folded into basis/funding regime.

disabled_regimes: Low basis volatility: z-score undefined

notes: `threshold_bps` is expressed in basis points and is converted against decimal `funding_rate_scaled` values at runtime.

BASIS_FUNDING_DISLOCATION.notes: Funding extreme onset under basis/funding dislocation.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize AUC of forward return vs funding normalization probability. Require at least min_hazard_events = 50 events over calibration window.

failure_modes.Near-zero funding regime: percentile compression, all ranks cluster at 50th

calibration.stability_requirement: Threshold must produce >= 30 events on both first-half and second-half of in-sample period. Threshold deviation across assets < 5 percentile points.

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price action confirms signal validity

detector.formula:
funding_pct_rank[i] = percentile_rank(funding_rate[i], lookback=funding_pct_window)
accel[i]            = funding_rate[i] - funding_rate[i - accel_lookback]
accel_pct_rank[i]   = percentile_rank(accel[i], lookback=funding_pct_window)
extreme_flag[i]     = (funding_pct_rank[i] >= extreme_pct / 100)
accel_flag[i]       = (accel_pct_rank[i] >= accel_pct / 100)
persist_flag[i]     = all(extreme_flag[i-k] for k in 0..persistence_bars-1)
event onset         = first bar where extreme_flag AND accel_flag AND persist_flag
detector.signal_definition: Detects the onset of a funding rate extreme: funding crosses the extreme_pct percentile of its rolling history AND shows acceleration (accel_pct of recent delta distribution). Requires persistence across persistence_bars intervals.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected at bar close when all conditions first simultaneously satisfied. No intrabar data used.

disabled_regimes.CHOP_TO_TREND_SHIFT: trend onset may reinforce funding direction, not reverse

expected_overlap.OI_FLUSH: high co-occurrence; OI flush often follows funding extreme

expected_overlap.LIQUIDATION_CASCADE: moderate co-occurrence if extreme is on losing side

expected_overlap.SPREAD_BLOWOUT: low co-occurrence; funding and spread are independent signals

false_positive_scenarios.Anticipated funding resets (8h schedule): onset may be mechanistic not informational

false_positive_scenarios.Low-OI instruments: funding extremes do not cause forced liquidations

false_positive_scenarios: Regime of persistent one-sided funding (trending market)
invalidation_conditions: Funding rate drops below normalization_pct within normalization_lookback bars
OI increases significantly (new longs entering, not an exhaustion setup)

parameters.trigger: Detector triggers on funding extreme onset pattern

calibration.calibration_target: Select the smallest threshold that preserves pair-specific stability while maintaining acceptable event counts across major pairs.

failure_modes.Missing paired series: detector disabled and emits no event

failure_modes.Pair definition drift: apparent spread may reflect a bad pair mapping rather than true desync

failure_modes.Stale reference feed: spread inflation is a data artifact

calibration.stability_requirement: Threshold must remain within one z-score step across calibration splits for the same pair universe.

parameters.causal_mechanism: When two historically linked assets stop moving together, one leg may be lagging price discovery or absorbing flow asymmetrically. The contract only fires when the divergence is observed on paired data; it never degrades into a single-asset anomaly label.

detector.formula:
ret_a[i] = log(close[i] / close[i-1])
ret_b[i] = log(pair_close[i] / pair_close[i-1])
basis[i] = ret_a[i] - ret_b[i]
desync_z[i] = zscore(basis, lookback_window)[i]
onset[i] = abs(desync_z[i]) >= threshold_z AND abs(desync_z[i-1]) < threshold_z
detector.signal_definition: Detect a paired cross-asset spread dislocation using synchronized close series for the target asset and its declared paired asset.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected at bar close on the first paired bar that breaches the declared desynchronization threshold.

disabled_regimes.SCHEDULED_NEWS_WINDOW_EVENT active on on: flow is event-specific rather than cross-asset desync

expected_overlap.CROSS_VENUE_DESYNC: can co-occur when one asset also splits across venues

expected_overlap.VOL_SHOCK: moderate overlap when pair divergence emerges during volatility regime shifts

false_positive_scenarios: Pair close derived from asynchronous venues
Single-asset shock incorrectly joined to a stale paired series
invalidation_conditions: Paired spread mean-reverts below 1.0 z-score before follow-through develops
Pair relationship breaks structurally because the reference asset regime changed

LIQUIDATION_CASCADE.notes: Use when liquidation_notional data is unavailable (e.g., Bybit native data without cross-exchange liquidation feed). Expected to have lower precision than LIQUIDATION_CASCADE but comparable recall for large cascade events.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize AUC of forward return (price recovery) vs oi_reduction_pct. Require at least 30 events over calibration window.

failure_modes.Low-OI instrument: oi_delta_1h noisy, pct drop threshold unreliable

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price recovery confirms forced-selling exhaustion

detector.formula:
oi_pct_drop[i]  = -(oi_delta_1h[i] / oi_notional[i])
oi_drop_th[i]   = quantile(oi_pct_drop[1..i-1], oi_drop_quantile, window=oi_window)
vol_th[i]       = quantile(taker_base_volume[1..i-1], vol_surge_quantile, window=vol_window)
price_drop[i]   = -(min(low[i-ret_window:i]) / close[i-ret_window] - 1)
mask[i]         = (oi_pct_drop >= oi_drop_th) AND (volume >= vol_th) AND (price_drop >= price_drop_th)
episode         = contiguous mask episode with max_gap=1
keep_episode    = oi_reduction_pct(episode) >= min_episode_oi_reduction_pct
event           = peak-intensity bar of kept episode
detector.signal_definition: Detects liquidation-cascade-like conditions using only native exchange data. Fires when OI pct drop >= rolling_quantile(oi_pct_drop, oi_drop_quantile) AND taker_base_volume >= rolling_quantile(volume, vol_surge_quantile) AND min(low[i-ret_window:i]) / close[i-ret_window] - 1 <= -price_drop_th, then retains only episodes whose net OI reduction exceeds min_episode_oi_reduction_pct.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event anchored at peak-intensity bar within episode.

disabled_regimes.LOW_LIQUIDITY_STATE active: oi_delta_1h noise inflates pct drop signal

expected_overlap.OI_FLUSH: high co-occurrence (OI_FLUSH is a subset without volume/price confirmation)

expected_overlap.FUNDING_EXTREME_ONSET: low co-occurrence (proxy fires on execution, not funding level)

false_positive_scenarios: Scheduled funding payment causing OI adjustment without forced liquidations
Delisting or partial rollover reducing OI mechanically
invalidation_conditions: OI recovers within 12 bars (false flush, not cascade)
Volume spike without directional price move (block trade, not forced selling)

parameters.trigger: Detector triggers on OI drop + volume surge + price drop coincidence

calibration.calibration_target: Minimum event count >= min_events_calibration; prefer higher quantile.
calibration.stability_requirement: Selected threshold must yield >= min_events_calibration events on both in-sample and the most recent 12-month rolling window.

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price action confirms signal validity

detector.formula:
abs_return[i]    = abs(close[i] / close[i-1] - 1)
vol_ratio[i]     = volume[i] / rolling_median(volume, volume_window)[i]
range_pct[i]     = (high[i] - low[i]) / close[i]
range_med[i]     = rolling_median(range_pct, range_window)[i]
shock_onset      = (abs_return[i] >= t_shock) AND (abs_return[i-1] < t_shock)
vacuum_bar[j]    = (vol_ratio[j] < vol_ratio_floor) AND (range_pct[j] > range_multiplier * range_med[j])
event detected   = shock_onset[i] AND count(vacuum_bar, i+1..i+k) >= min_vacuum_bars
detector.signal_definition: Identifies bars where an absolute return shock (abs_return >= t_shock) is immediately followed by consecutive bars with below-median volume AND above-median intrabar range, indicating liquidity has withdrawn post-impulse.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected_ts = timestamp of last vacuum bar (exit bar). Signal available at bar close; no intrabar lookahead.

expected_overlap.DEPTH_COLLAPSE: high co-occurrence; both detect thin-book conditions

expected_overlap.VOL_SHOCK: moderate co-occurrence; may precede or co-occur

false_positive_scenarios: Low-liquidity asset with structurally low volume (always below median)
Wide-spread instruments where range_pct baseline is already elevated

false_positive_scenarios.Post-news window: shock may be informational, not a vacuum

invalidation_conditions: Volume returns above-median within 1 bar of event end
Range compresses below 0.8 * range_med within 2 bars

parameters.trigger: Detector triggers on liquidity vacuum pattern

VOLATILITY_TRANSITION.notes: Canonical volatility shock; current detector implementation also models relaxation boundary.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize stability of point-in-time shock-onset detection and usefulness of post-event decay telemetry (half-life, excess vol area, secondary-shock incidence) while keeping sufficient event counts per window.
failure_modes: Insufficient warmup history for trailing median / quantile calibration
calibration.stability_requirement: Shock threshold and onset frequency should remain stable across yearly splits and major symbols after accounting for realized-vol regime differences.

detector.formula:
logret[i]        = log(close[i] / close[i-1])
realized_vol[i]  = sqrt(mean(logret[i-rv_window+1..i]^2))
rv_base[i]       = trailing_median(realized_vol, baseline_window, lag=1)[i]
shock_ratio[i]   = realized_vol[i] / rv_base[i]
shock_threshold[i] = trailing_quantile(shock_ratio, baseline_window, shock_quantile, lag=1)[i]
onset[i]         = shock_ratio[i-1] < shock_threshold[i-1] AND shock_ratio[i] >= shock_threshold[i]
relax_exit[j]    = first j >= i such that shock_ratio[j] <= relax_threshold for relax_consecutive_bars consecutive bars
event            = onset[i]
detector.signal_definition: Detects realized-volatility shock onset using a point-in-time-safe dynamic threshold on the realized-volatility shock ratio. The emitted event is the first bar where the shock ratio crosses above the dynamic threshold; post-event fields record relaxation and decay diagnostics, but the detector does not require a separate bootstrap-confirmed relaxation gate before emission.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event anchor at first bar crossing above the dynamic shock threshold (shock onset). Detected at bar close; downstream metadata records the subsequent relaxation boundary.

disabled_regimes.LIQUIDITY_VACUUM active: vol signal unreliable during thin-book conditions

disabled_regimes.SCHEDULED_NEWS_WINDOW_EVENT: vol shock may be sustained, not relaxing

expected_overlap.TREND_ACCELERATION: low but possible; trending vol differs from shock vol

false_positive_scenarios: Weekend low-liquidity vol collapse (not a true relaxation)
Session open vol spike that reverts mechanically
Thin-book instrument where vol is noise-dominated
invalidation_conditions: Realized vol re-expands above shock threshold within phase_tolerance_bars
Second shock occurs before first relaxation completes

rows.notes: Hybrid liquidity-stress evidence: direct imbalance-stall confirmation combined with spread and RV stress.

parameters.confirmation: Spread and realized-volatility stress persist long enough to confirm the absorption signal.

rows.notes: First-class cross-asset desynchronization regime.

calibration.calibration_target: Select the smallest threshold that preserves pair-specific stability while maintaining acceptable event counts across major pairs.

failure_modes.Missing paired series: detector disabled and emits no event

failure_modes.Pair definition drift: apparent spread may reflect a bad pair mapping rather than true desync

failure_modes.Stale reference feed: spread inflation is a data artifact

calibration.stability_requirement: Threshold must remain within one z-score step across calibration splits for the same pair universe.

parameters.causal_mechanism: When two historically linked assets stop moving together, one leg may be lagging price discovery or absorbing flow asymmetrically. The contract only fires when the divergence is observed on paired data; it never degrades into a single-asset anomaly label.

detector.formula:
ret_a[i] = log(close[i] / close[i-1])
ret_b[i] = log(pair_close[i] / pair_close[i-1])
basis[i] = ret_a[i] - ret_b[i]
desync_z[i] = zscore(basis, lookback_window)[i]
onset[i] = abs(desync_z[i]) >= threshold_z AND abs(desync_z[i-1]) < threshold_z
detector.signal_definition: Detect a paired cross-asset spread dislocation using synchronized close series for the target asset and its declared paired asset.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected at bar close on the first paired bar that breaches the declared desynchronization threshold.

disabled_regimes.SCHEDULED_NEWS_WINDOW_EVENT active on on: flow is event-specific rather than cross-asset desync

expected_overlap.CROSS_VENUE_DESYNC: can co-occur when one asset also splits across venues

expected_overlap.VOL_SHOCK: moderate overlap when pair divergence emerges during volatility regime shifts

false_positive_scenarios: Pair close derived from asynchronous venues
Single-asset shock incorrectly joined to a stale paired series
invalidation_conditions: Paired spread mean-reverts below 1.0 z-score before follow-through develops
Pair relationship breaks structurally because the reference asset regime changed

rows.notes: Cross-venue basis persistence folded into basis/funding dislocation.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize information ratio of mean-reversion return within window_end bars. Require at least 40 events per asset over calibration window.

failure_modes.Stale perp data feed: basis appears large but is a data artifact

failure_modes.Funding payment bar: basis jumps mechanically at funding timestamps

calibration.stability_requirement: anchor_quantile consistent across BTC/ETH spot-perp pairs within 0.01. Hit rate of reversion within window_end > 55% on both halves.

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price action confirms signal validity

detector.formula:
basis[i]       = perp_close[i] - spot_close[i]
basis_z[i]     = (basis[i] - mean(basis, basis_lookback)) / std(basis, basis_lookback)
shock_th       = quantile(abs(basis_z), anchor_quantile) over basis_lookback
shock_flag[i]  = abs(basis_z[i]) >= shock_th
revert_flag[i] = abs(basis_z[i]) <= revert_z
event onset    = shock_flag transitions False to True
event exit     = first subsequent bar where revert_flag = True (capped at window_end)
detector.signal_definition: Detects cross-venue price desynchronization: spot-perp basis (or inter-exchange basis) exceeds its extreme quantile, indicating one venue is lagging price discovery. Event exits when basis z-score reverts.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected at bar close of onset bar. window_end caps maximum event duration in bars.

disabled_regimes.SPREAD_BLOWOUT active: execution cost exceeds basis reversion profit

expected_overlap.LIQUIDATION_CASCADE: moderate; cascade can create cross-venue desync

false_positive_scenarios.Funding payment timestamps: instantaneous basis jump with no trading edge

false_positive_scenarios.Market open: basis may be mechanically elevated at session start

invalidation_conditions: Basis continues expanding beyond 2x onset z-score (no reversion setup)
New shock within window_end bars of prior event

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize AUC of forward return vs funding normalization probability. Require at least min_hazard_events = 50 events over calibration window.

failure_modes.Near-zero funding regime: percentile compression, all ranks cluster at 50th

calibration.stability_requirement: Threshold must produce >= 30 events on both first-half and second-half of in-sample period. Threshold deviation across assets < 5 percentile points.

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price action confirms signal validity

detector.formula:
funding_pct_rank[i] = percentile_rank(funding_rate[i], lookback=funding_pct_window)
accel[i]            = funding_rate[i] - funding_rate[i - accel_lookback]
accel_pct_rank[i]   = percentile_rank(accel[i], lookback=funding_pct_window)
extreme_flag[i]     = (funding_pct_rank[i] >= extreme_pct / 100)
accel_flag[i]       = (accel_pct_rank[i] >= accel_pct / 100)
persist_flag[i]     = all(extreme_flag[i-k] for k in 0..persistence_bars-1)
event onset         = first bar where extreme_flag AND accel_flag AND persist_flag
detector.signal_definition: Detects the onset of a funding rate extreme: funding crosses the extreme_pct percentile of its rolling history AND shows acceleration (accel_pct of recent delta distribution). Requires persistence across persistence_bars intervals.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected at bar close when all conditions first simultaneously satisfied. No intrabar data used.

disabled_regimes.CHOP_TO_TREND_SHIFT: trend onset may reinforce funding direction, not reverse

expected_overlap.OI_FLUSH: high co-occurrence; OI flush often follows funding extreme

expected_overlap.LIQUIDATION_CASCADE: moderate co-occurrence if extreme is on losing side

expected_overlap.SPREAD_BLOWOUT: low co-occurrence; funding and spread are independent signals

false_positive_scenarios.Anticipated funding resets (8h schedule): onset may be mechanistic not informational

false_positive_scenarios.Low-OI instruments: funding extremes do not cause forced liquidations

false_positive_scenarios: Regime of persistent one-sided funding (trending market)
invalidation_conditions: Funding rate drops below normalization_pct within normalization_lookback bars
OI increases significantly (new longs entering, not an exhaustion setup)

rows.notes: Use when liquidation_notional data is unavailable (e.g., Bybit native data without cross-exchange liquidation feed). Expected to have lower precision than LIQUIDATION_CASCADE but comparable recall for large cascade events.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize AUC of forward return (price recovery) vs oi_reduction_pct. Require at least 30 events over calibration window.

failure_modes.Low-OI instrument: oi_delta_1h noisy, pct drop threshold unreliable

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price recovery confirms forced-selling exhaustion

detector.formula:
oi_pct_drop[i]  = -(oi_delta_1h[i] / oi_notional[i])
oi_drop_th[i]   = quantile(oi_pct_drop[1..i-1], oi_drop_quantile, window=oi_window)
vol_th[i]       = quantile(taker_base_volume[1..i-1], vol_surge_quantile, window=vol_window)
price_drop[i]   = -(min(low[i-ret_window:i]) / close[i-ret_window] - 1)
mask[i]         = (oi_pct_drop >= oi_drop_th) AND (volume >= vol_th) AND (price_drop >= price_drop_th)
episode         = contiguous mask episode with max_gap=1
keep_episode    = oi_reduction_pct(episode) >= min_episode_oi_reduction_pct
event           = peak-intensity bar of kept episode
detector.signal_definition: Detects liquidation-cascade-like conditions using only native exchange data. Fires when OI pct drop >= rolling_quantile(oi_pct_drop, oi_drop_quantile) AND taker_base_volume >= rolling_quantile(volume, vol_surge_quantile) AND min(low[i-ret_window:i]) / close[i-ret_window] - 1 <= -price_drop_th, then retains only episodes whose net OI reduction exceeds min_episode_oi_reduction_pct.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event anchored at peak-intensity bar within episode.

disabled_regimes.LOW_LIQUIDITY_STATE active: oi_delta_1h noise inflates pct drop signal

expected_overlap.OI_FLUSH: high co-occurrence (OI_FLUSH is a subset without volume/price confirmation)

expected_overlap.FUNDING_EXTREME_ONSET: low co-occurrence (proxy fires on execution, not funding level)

false_positive_scenarios: Scheduled funding payment causing OI adjustment without forced liquidations
Delisting or partial rollover reducing OI mechanically
invalidation_conditions: OI recovers within 12 bars (false flush, not cascade)
Volume spike without directional price move (block trade, not forced selling)

rows.notes: Thin-book vacuum regime.

calibration.calibration_target: Minimum event count >= min_events_calibration; prefer higher quantile.
calibration.stability_requirement: Selected threshold must yield >= min_events_calibration events on both in-sample and the most recent 12-month rolling window.

parameters.confirmation: Post-detection price action confirms signal validity

detector.formula:
abs_return[i]    = abs(close[i] / close[i-1] - 1)
vol_ratio[i]     = volume[i] / rolling_median(volume, volume_window)[i]
range_pct[i]     = (high[i] - low[i]) / close[i]
range_med[i]     = rolling_median(range_pct, range_window)[i]
shock_onset      = (abs_return[i] >= t_shock) AND (abs_return[i-1] < t_shock)
vacuum_bar[j]    = (vol_ratio[j] < vol_ratio_floor) AND (range_pct[j] > range_multiplier * range_med[j])
event detected   = shock_onset[i] AND count(vacuum_bar, i+1..i+k) >= min_vacuum_bars
detector.signal_definition: Identifies bars where an absolute return shock (abs_return >= t_shock) is immediately followed by consecutive bars with below-median volume AND above-median intrabar range, indicating liquidity has withdrawn post-impulse.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event detected_ts = timestamp of last vacuum bar (exit bar). Signal available at bar close; no intrabar lookahead.

expected_overlap.DEPTH_COLLAPSE: high co-occurrence; both detect thin-book conditions

expected_overlap.VOL_SHOCK: moderate co-occurrence; may precede or co-occur

false_positive_scenarios: Low-liquidity asset with structurally low volume (always below median)
Wide-spread instruments where range_pct baseline is already elevated

false_positive_scenarios.Post-news window: shock may be informational, not a vacuum

invalidation_conditions: Volume returns above-median within 1 bar of event end
Range compresses below 0.8 * range_med within 2 bars

rows.notes: Canonical volatility shock; current detector implementation also models relaxation boundary.

calibration.calibration_target: Maximize stability of point-in-time shock-onset detection and usefulness of post-event decay telemetry (half-life, excess vol area, secondary-shock incidence) while keeping sufficient event counts per window.
failure_modes: Insufficient warmup history for trailing median / quantile calibration
calibration.stability_requirement: Shock threshold and onset frequency should remain stable across yearly splits and major symbols after accounting for realized-vol regime differences.

detector.formula:
logret[i]        = log(close[i] / close[i-1])
realized_vol[i]  = sqrt(mean(logret[i-rv_window+1..i]^2))
rv_base[i]       = trailing_median(realized_vol, baseline_window, lag=1)[i]
shock_ratio[i]   = realized_vol[i] / rv_base[i]
shock_threshold[i] = trailing_quantile(shock_ratio, baseline_window, shock_quantile, lag=1)[i]
onset[i]         = shock_ratio[i-1] < shock_threshold[i-1] AND shock_ratio[i] >= shock_threshold[i]
relax_exit[j]    = first j >= i such that shock_ratio[j] <= relax_threshold for relax_consecutive_bars consecutive bars
event            = onset[i]
detector.signal_definition: Detects realized-volatility shock onset using a point-in-time-safe dynamic threshold on the realized-volatility shock ratio. The emitted event is the first bar where the shock ratio crosses above the dynamic threshold; post-event fields record relaxation and decay diagnostics, but the detector does not require a separate bootstrap-confirmed relaxation gate before emission.
detector.timestamp_alignment: Event anchor at first bar crossing above the dynamic shock threshold (shock onset). Detected at bar close; downstream metadata records the subsequent relaxation boundary.

disabled_regimes.LIQUIDITY_VACUUM active: vol signal unreliable during thin-book conditions

disabled_regimes.SCHEDULED_NEWS_WINDOW_EVENT: vol shock may be sustained, not relaxing

expected_overlap.TREND_ACCELERATION: low but possible; trending vol differs from shock vol

false_positive_scenarios: Weekend low-liquidity vol collapse (not a true relaxation)
Session open vol spike that reverts mechanically
Thin-book instrument where vol is noise-dominated
invalidation_conditions: Realized vol re-expands above shock threshold within phase_tolerance_bars
Second shock occurs before first relaxation completes
